reason: Start in the middle of the budget range: large enough to learn non-trivial language, math, science, and coding structure, small enough to keep pretraining on a 4 GB card realistic.
next_actions: Pretrain the recommended byte-level baseline until the loss curve stabilizes.
Replace the byte tokenizer with a compact SentencePiece/BPE tokenizer and rerun the protocol sweep.
Distill calculator traces with the recommended compact protocol.
Run an ablation with Titans-inspired memory on and off after the base model can answer short tasks.
